dj_text: If FZero - "Silence" [Bardcore] was a warmup, FZero - "Big Blue" [Bardcore] is the main event. If FZero - "Silence" [Bardcore] was the main event, FZero - "Big Blue" [Bardcore] is the hangover. One more left in the queue.
commercial_text: Welcome back to That Pirate Bot DJ Radio, where we celebrate beats with our pirate Bardcore!
hijack_text: From across realities, I bring a slice of eternal yesterday
recovery_text: HOW are they on our frequency?! That dimension doesn't even HAVE frequencies!
title: FZero - "Big Blue" [Bardcore]
